explain: stories about how people and societies are affected by imaginary scientific developments in the future
something that is produced by the imagination; an idea about doing something that is far removed from normal reality

to hold a person against their will
strange, unknown, or difficult to understand
the act of picking or deciding between two or more possibilities
a small, rounded object that you swallow and that contains medicine, vitamins, etc.
to see, find, or become aware of (something) for the first time
